svg.title: SEEK job agent module architecture
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing the project's Python modules: two entry points (main.py for chat, batch_search.py for scripted runs) calling into an app package containing agent.py, scraper.py, matcher.py, memory.py, ollama_client.py, and criteria.py, with external connections to a local Ollama LLM server and the SEEK NZ website.
